title: Class Weighting
summary: Assigning different weights to different classes in a classification problem, often to handle class imbalance. It sits inside Model Training / Imbalanced Data Handling. Compare it with Error Sanctioning and Cross-validation with class weighting. It opens into Cross-validation with class weighting.
